title: Changes In The Lab - Part 1
description: Just to keep you up to date with what's happening and why we sometimes don't do a video for a while. Some of our current projects are Batteries and supercapacitors, bioplastics and graphene reinforced bioplastics, desalination, generation from seawater, concrete reinforcement with graphene, generation from piezo electric concrete, soaps, coal graphetisation and remodelling the lab - all while keeping you in touch with what's happening and trying to help you investigate for yourself - cheers
